case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ANANIAS GERARDO VELASQUEZ GAMBOA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAMBOA, ANANIAS GERARDO VELASQUEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBOA, ANANIAS GERARDO VELASQUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-28-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBOA, ANANIAS GERARDO VELASQUEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CENDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANANIAS GERARDO VELASQUEZ GAMBOA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
